notes: 3.12.16 — HOAN TAT TRON GD1 DA PHAP NHAN theo phe duyet v1.2.1 + 3 dieu kien implementation notes (FLAG OFF, khong doi ket qua luong production). (1) taxCalculate() — NGUON CONG THUC PIT DUY NHAT toan he (dieu kien 1): PROGRESSIVE doc pitBrackets + gtgc tu taxRules effective-dated/active; FLAT/NON_RESIDENT doc methodRates; thieu rule → valid:false + reason ro (khong doan); solver + post-validation GD2 deu se goi ham nay — khong bo cong thuc thu hai; validation doc lap ve DU LIEU tai dung, khong ve nguon cong thuc. (2) SOLVER_CONFIG bo sung minGross + maxGrossAbsolute (dieu kien 3): can tren = min(multiplier×target, maxGrossAbsolute); targetNet am/sai currency → invalid_input; =0 → tinh truc tiep; adjustment ngoai vong solver; ghi chu dieu kien 2 (bracket nhan ngay nghiem tai can |residual|<=tol, khong bat buoc trai dau; minor currency unit; Gross>=0; doan phang chon Gross NHO NHAT qua post-validation) vao code comment lam noi quy GD2. (3) MIGRATION MATRIX GD1: man ⚖ Phap nhan ky (nut thanh cong cu, admin): liet ke ky chua companyId (chi khi ≥2 cty), gan tung ky BAT BUOC kem can cu chung tu, ky DA KHOA chi ghi companyId + _migration{by,at,evidence,CONFIRMED} + audit — khong dung du lieu tinh, khong mac dinh cty me; phep n1_period_company_unresolved mo thang man nay. + IMPLEMENTATION-NOTES-DA-PHAP-NHAN.md kem bo giao. Engine hash bat bien. Rollback=3.10.41.
